title: claude-profiles workspace marker
description: Per-workspace marker recording which profile a workspace uses. Lives at <workspace>/.claude-profiles and is committed with the workspace.

profile.description: Profile branch name for this workspace, or the literal "none" to record an explicit opt-out.

source.description: Name of the source (config.sources[].name) this profile comes from. Omitted/optional while only one source exists. (Issue #1.)

repo.description: Repo URL of the source, recorded for reference. Omitted when profile is "none".
